expectation_update: v0 completed in one active session, so the previous one-year v0-v2 timeline is too conservative and must be recalibrated from logged progress
notes: Minutes are active-work estimate reconstructed from the session; future entries should be logged at session end. Estimated/planned time; not measured clock time.
task: Initial scaffold, live source samples, seed graph, public GitHub publish

expectation_update: Use observed artifact-per-hour rate to revise v1 and v2 estimates after each material chunk.
notes: Estimated/planned time; not measured clock time.
scope_adjustment: Project management is now repository state, not chat state; future scope changes must be recorded in the ledger.
task: Add durable work folder, time ledger, scope calibration, and progress report tooling

expectation_update: V1 completed much faster than the earlier days-to-weeks estimate because paginated M-CSA and UniProt TSV APIs were straightforward.
notes: Estimated/planned time; not measured clock time.
scope_adjustment: V1 criteria are satisfied by a bounded 50-entry graph slice; broader scale is now an expansion problem, not a schema blocker.
task: Build persistent catalytic graph with M-CSA pages, Rhea EC mapping, UniProt links, and structure cross-references

expectation_update: The completed V2 is a scaffold-level research artifact, not the final high-impact enzyme atlas; time estimates must distinguish scaffold completion from scientific validation.
notes: Estimated/planned time; not measured clock time.
scope_adjustment: V2 scaffold criteria are satisfied; next work should increase scientific quality rather than add more dashboard-like surface area.
task: Build first V2 benchmark, baseline retrieval, inconsistency detector, dark hydrolase mining campaign, dossiers, and report

expectation_update: Geometry extraction was implementable quickly for PDB-linked M-CSA entries; the harder next step is label quality and retrieval evaluation.
notes: Estimated/planned time; not measured clock time.
scope_adjustment: Post-V2 quality work now targets geometry-aware retrieval rather than more text-only scaffolding.
task: Add geometry-aware active-site feature extraction from PDB mmCIF files

expectation_update: Next quality bottleneck is curated mechanism labels and evaluation, not baseline implementation.
notes: Estimated/planned time; not measured clock time.
scope_adjustment: Geometry now affects retrieval scores through residue signature matching and catalytic-cluster compactness.
task: Add geometry-aware seed fingerprint retrieval baseline

expectation_update: The next bottleneck is improving ranking and abstention, not adding labels machinery.
notes: Estimated/planned time; not measured clock time.
scope_adjustment: Curated labels are now explicit for the 20-entry geometry slice; retrieval quality is measurable and currently weak at top1.
task: Add curated seed mechanism labels and geometry retrieval evaluation

expectation_update: Progress will now be measured per hourly block rather than per ad hoc milestone.
notes: Estimated/planned time; not measured clock time.
scope_adjustment: Each automation run is now an hourly carry-forward block: 55 minutes work, 5 minutes break/overhead, commit and push every run.
task: Update automation cadence to 55-minute hourly work blocks with mandatory push

expectation_update: Continuity is now treated as a required output of each 55-minute work block.
notes: Estimated/planned time; not measured clock time.
scope_adjustment: Every automation run must now leave explicit next-agent start instructions before committing and pushing.
task: Require next-agent handoff update after every hourly block

expectation_update: The time overestimate came from confusing scaffold implementation with scientifically robust validation; current progress is fast but still small-label and artifact-scale.
notes: Estimated/planned time; not measured clock time.
scope_adjustment: V2 is stronger: retrieval has cofactor-aware scoring, calibrated abstention, and local performance measurement; full scalability and ligand parsing remain future work.
task: Strengthen V2 retrieval calibration and performance checks

expectation_update: Ligand/cofactor context integration from mmCIF was quick; next quality bottleneck shifts to substrate-pocket descriptors and larger curated labels.
scope_adjustment: Post-V2 quality scope now includes ligand-supported cofactor evidence in retrieval; substrate-pocket descriptors become the next bounded upgrade.
task: Add mmCIF ligand/cofactor context to geometry features and retrieval scoring

evidence: current state and next automation task clarified
expectation_update: README now states that scaffold work moved faster than first estimated; impact depends on scaling labels, harder benchmarks, expert review, and validation.
scope_adjustment: Next automation should continue from substrate-pocket descriptors and harder negative controls, not from v0-v2 scaffold planning.
task: Update README timeline and final handoff before next automation

expectation_update: Substrate-pocket descriptors integrated quickly; next bottleneck is targeted failure analysis and label expansion rather than more feature plumbing.
scope_adjustment: Post-V2 retrieval now includes pocket-aware scoring; next bounded iteration should tune abstention and false-positive control using failure categories.
task: Add substrate-pocket descriptors and pocket-aware retrieval scoring

evidence: automation requires remaining-time plan after early task completion
automation requires final git sync verification
expectation_update: Future runs should consume the full 55-minute wall-clock block by rolling into the next highest-value bounded task when assigned work finishes early.
scope_adjustment: Automation handoff now requires origin/main sync verification before the next agent starts.
task: Tighten automation early-completion and git sync rules

expectation_update: Current out-of-scope errors are threshold-margin cases; next gain likely comes from abstention policy refinement and harder negatives.
scope_adjustment: Failure analysis is now explicit and reproducible; next bounded step is threshold-policy tuning with guardrails.
task: Add out-of-scope failure analysis artifact and threshold hint

evidence: all automation TOML files with model fields now show gpt-5.5
all automation TOML files with reasoning fields now show xhigh
expectation_update: Automation model selection is now treated as an operating invariant, not an implicit app default.
scope_adjustment: Catalytic Earth automation documentation now forbids downgrading below gpt-5.5 with xhigh reasoning.

evidence: automation requires productive project work until 50 elapsed wall-clock minutes
automation forbids early handoff idle time or reporting-only time before wrap
expectation_update: Automation runs now distinguish productive work time from wrap-up time; normal runs should spend at least 50 measured minutes advancing the project.
scope_adjustment: If assigned work finishes or blocks early, agents must switch to the highest-value bounded unblocked task until the 50-minute work boundary.

expectation_update: Next priority is hard-negative scorer separation and structure mapping repair, not more scaffold work
scope_adjustment: 40-entry slice now has 36 labels, 26 evaluable structures, and explicit hard-negative plus structure-mapping blockers
task: Calibrate geometry abstention and expand labels
